title: Senior Product Designer (AI-Driven, Analytics SaaS, High-Ownership Product Team)
description:
My Client:

My client is an early-stage, product-led AI company building the next generation of performance creative intelligence for growth marketers and ad agencies. Their platform helps teams understand what creative strategies actually drive performance, combining analytics, insight generation, and decision support in one workflow.

The Role:

As a Senior Product Designer, you will play a key role in shaping the end-to-end user experience of a performance analytics and creative intelligence platform. You will work closely with the founder and engineers to shape a data-heavy, AI-powered B2B product from the ground up, with real ownership over core user experiences and product direction.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Design and improve core product experiences across analytics, ad insights, and creative exploration workflows.
  • Conduct user and competitor research to identify gaps, opportunities, and areas for iterative product improvement.
  • Translate complex data, insights, and AI-driven recommendations into clear, intuitive UX/UI solutions.
  • Own end-to-end design delivery, from early concepts and wireframes to high-fidelity designs and prototypes.
  • Evolve and maintain the product design system to ensure consistency and scalability across features.
  • Work closely with engineers and the founder to align design decisions with technical feasibility and business goals.
  • Continuously refine the product experience based on user feedback, data, and real-world usage.

Job Requirements:

  • 5+ years of experience in product / UX / UI design, with at least 2+ years working on B2B or SaaS products.
  • Proven experience designing complex workflows, dashboards, or data-heavy products.
  • Strong product thinking and UX fundamentals, with solid visual and interaction design skills.
  • High proficiency in Figma and prototyping tools.
  • Experience working with or extending design systems for scalable products.
  • Ability to collaborate effectively in fast-moving, cross-functional teams with engineers and product leaders.

What They Offer:

  • A high-ownership role with direct influence over a core AI-powered product.
  • The opportunity to work on real, production-facing features rather than experimental or purely conceptual work.
  • Competitive salary and equity, with flexibility in working arrangements and room for long-term growth.


About Us

Dada Consultants was established in 2017, with the commitment of providing the best recruitment services in Singapore. We are comprised of a dynamic head-hunting team dedicated to sourcing for highly competent professionals in IT industry. We provide enterprises with customized talent solutions, and bring talents to career advancement.

If it sounds like your next move, please don’t hesitate to apply. Kindly note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Appreciate your understanding. Data provided is for recruitment purposes only.

Join US!

Due to confidence and client demand in Singapore, we're looking for an experienced tech recruitment Consultant to join our team to service our clients across Asia Pacific.
